parameters.formDescription:
Use this workflow to deploy other workflows to production.
Press "Submit" to select the workflow to be deployed.

nodes.name: Select folders for given parent folder

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.workflow_entity WHERE "parentFolderId" IN ({{ $('Merge all valid development folders').item.json.data.map(id => `'${id}'`).join(", ") }}) ORDER BY "updatedAt" DESC
